report.title: Cross-Border Diagnostic Report
report.subtitle: Google Professional Consultant Level Assessment
report.phase1Desc: Resolve critical and high-risk issues, establish baseline security and tracking
report.phase2Desc: Improve content structure, deepen tracking, optimize user experience
report.phase3Desc: Refined operations, A/B testing, long-term monitoring and iteration
report.noCriticalItems: No critical items — current status is good, proceed to next phase.
report.disclaimer: This report is AI-assisted. Please combine with actual business conditions for decision-making. For further consultation, please contact a professional cross-border advisory team.
report.execSummaryIntro: This report provides a comprehensive cross-border compliance and performance diagnosis for {url}, covering four core modules: global access acceleration, lead page security, product content completeness, and form data tracking. The overall health score is {score}/100, with an overall rating of {rating}.
report.execSummaryRoadmap: It is recommended to follow the 30/60/90-day implementation roadmap in this report to prioritize resolving critical and high-risk issues. Significant improvement in global access experience, lead conversion rate, and data tracking completeness is expected within 90 days.
report.criticalModulesMsg: {count} modules have critical risk and require immediate attention;
report.highModulesMsg: {count} modules have high risk and should be optimized in the short term;
report.mediumModulesMsg: {count} modules are at medium level with room for improvement;
report.severityBannerCritical: This module has critical issues and should be prioritized for immediate resolution.
report.severityBannerHigh: This module has significant improvement opportunities and should be optimized in the short term.
report.severityBannerMedium: This module is performing well with details that can be further improved.
report.severityBannerLow: This module is performing excellently; maintain current strategy.
report.roiMapGlobalAcceleration: Expected to improve page load speed by 30-50% and reduce bounce rate by 15-25%
report.roiMapLeadPage: Expected to improve form submission conversion rate by 20-40% and reduce lead loss
report.roiMapProductContent: Expected to improve page dwell time by 25-35% and enhance brand trust
report.roiMapFormTracking: Expected to improve ad ROAS by 20-30% and enable precise attribution
report.roiDefault: Expected to improve overall operational efficiency by 15-25%

globalAcceleration.title: Global Acceleration
globalAcceleration.description: CDN deployment, protocol optimization and caching strategy analysis

leadPageCheck.title: Lead Page Check
leadPageCheck.description: HTTPS, security shield, form structure and conversion path review

productContentAudit.title: Product Content Audit
productContentAudit.description: Compliance certification, customer endorsement, technical specs and content completeness evaluation

formTracking.title: Form Tracking
formTracking.description: GA4, Meta Pixel, conversion tracking and UTM attribution detection

apiErrors.mvpCodeWarning: [MVP Test Mode] Verification code returned directly. Production must use a real SMS/email gateway.
apiErrors.wechatLoginNotConfiguredMessage: WeChat login requires configuring an open platform account (appid/appsecret). Please contact the admin.
apiErrors.wechatMissingCredentials: WeChat login not configured: missing WECHAT_APPID / WECHAT_APPSECRET environment variables
apiErrors.wechatMissingCredentialsDetail: WeChat login not configured: missing WECHAT_APPID / WECHAT_APPSECRET environment variables. Please contact the admin to configure a WeChat Open Platform account.
apiErrors.wechatCallbackNotImplemented: WeChat OAuth callback framework is ready, but full user query/creation logic requires credentials.
apiErrors.wechatBindNotConfigured: WeChat bind not configured: missing WECHAT_APPID / WECHAT_APPSECRET environment variables
apiErrors.wechatBindNotImplemented: WeChat bind framework is ready, full logic requires credentials.
